steps.t: A coin can be collected from the banker in the Dale Crafting Hall, the wood from a foreign trader in the lower markets near the eastern gate, and the …
You should return to Queen Regent Erna with the items she asked you to gather, inside the Great-keep in Dale.
The Queen Regent and her sons stand within the Great-keep in Dale. You should present Bryn and Erna with the puzzle box.
The Queen Regent and her sons stand within the Great-keep in Dale. Hear more from Queen Regent Erna.
The Queen Regent and her sons stand within the Great-keep in Dale. You should present Bryn and Erna with the Snakewood.
The Queen Regent and her sons stand within the Great-keep in Dale. Hear more from Queen Regent Erna.
The Queen Regent and her sons stand within the Great-keep in Dale. You should present Bryn and Erna with the coin of Dale.
The Queen Regent and her sons stand within the Great-keep in Dale. Hear more from Queen Regent Erna.
The Queen Regent and her sons stand within the Great-keep in Dale. Bryn has grown tired of listening and speaks out of turn.
